nasb.text: His brother’s name was Jubal; he was the father of all those who play the lyre and pipe.

esv.text: His brother’s name was Jubal; he was the father of all those who play the lyre and pipe.

cnv.text: 雅八的兄弟名叫猶八；猶八是所有彈琴吹簫的人的鼻祖。

ccb.text: 亚八的弟弟犹八是吹奏乐器之人的鼻祖。

csbs.text: 他的兄弟名叫犹巴，犹巴是所有弹竖琴和吹笛子之人的祖先。
